name: 000.0000.002 - Parametric Pavilion
description: Generates a parametric pavilion structure driven by a grid of user-defined control points. Outputs structural member layout, roof surface geometry, and a basic material schedule directly into Revit.
author: your name
how_to_use: Ensure the column family is loaded in the Revit model before running
Set grid dimensions (X, Y count) and bay spacing in the input nodes
Paste your control point height values as a flat list
Select the column family type from the dropdown
Run the script — columns and roof surface will be placed automatically
Open the generated schedule in Revit to verify member counts and lengths
notes: Control point heights drive an interpolated surface using numpy. Works best with even grid dimensions. Odd grid counts may produce asymmetric results at boundary edges. Column family must be loaded in the Revit model before running.
